variants.title: HiFi Filter OS 5065 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO57650
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OS 5065 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO57650
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OS 5065 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO57650. Easy to install and replace, the OS 5065 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
